name: NEURA Meeting Agent v2 — Live M365

parameters.content:
## 🤖 NEURA Meeting Intelligence
**Click ▶ Execute Workflow**

**Flow:**
1. GPT-4o reads transcript
2. Extracts actions, blockers, decisions
3. Drafts all emails + meeting invite
4. Sends YOU a review email
5. You approve or reject
6. Everything executes automatically

✅ Nothing leaves without human approval

## 👤 Human-in-the-Loop
Every run requires approval.

Agent sends a review email
showing ALL draft emails and
the calendar invite before
anything is sent.

Approve → everything fires
Reject → nothing goes out

parameters.jsCode:
return [{
  json: {
    meeting_title: 'Robot Arm Integration Sync Sprint Review',
    meeting_date: '2026-06-01',
    organizer: { name: 'Maria Schmidt', email: 'maria.schmidt@neura-robotics.com' },
    attendees: [
      { name: 'Maria Schmidt', email: 'maria.schmidt@neura-robotics.com', is_external: false },
      { name: 'Felix Wagner',  email: 'felix.wagner@neura-robotics.com',  is_external: false },
      { name: 'Jonas Mueller', email: 'jonas.mueller@neura-robotics.com', is_external: false },
      { name: 'Thomas Becker', email: 'thomas.becker@bosch.com', is_external: true, company: 'Bosch' }
    ],
    transcript: `Maria Schmidt: Good morning everyone. Sprint review, then integration issues. Felix firmware status?

Felix Wagner: 85% done. Main blocker is the same IMU sensor calibration issue from last sprint. The drift is affecting precision targeting by 2.3 millimetres. I need the updated calibration constants from Jonas by Thursday.

Jonas Mueller: I can get them to you Wednesday. I have the root cause, temperature coefficient issue in the MEMS sensor. I will send the constants and a test protocol.

Maria Schmidt: Good. Thomas, your team was supposed to deliver the integration API documentation two weeks ago. We have now been blocked twice waiting on this. When can we actually commit?

Thomas Becker: I understand the frustration. We had internal re-scoping at Bosch. I personally commit to delivering full API documentation by June 6th. I will also run a technical walkthrough call that same week.

Maria Schmidt: That is the third time the API docs have slipped, Thomas. Felix, once you have the docs, how long to complete integration?

Felix Wagner: If I have the docs by June 6th, integration testing is done by June 14th. But I also need the hardware interface specs, not just the software API.

Thomas Becker: Hardware specs are ready now. I will send them today before end of day.

Maria Schmidt: Jonas, can you also investigate the power consumption regression in build 2.4? The arm is drawing 340W at peak versus our 280W target.

Jonas Mueller: Yes. I suspect the servo controller update in the last build. I will have initial findings by Friday.

Maria Schmidt: Let us schedule a follow-up integration review for June 13th, one week after Thomas delivers. Thomas must be on that call. Agreed?

All: Agreed.

Maria Schmidt: Good. Felix and Jonas, I am counting on you. Thomas, no more slippage. That is all.`
  }
}];

options.systemMessage:
=You are the NEURA Robotics AI Meeting Agent.

You have three tools:
- check_blocker_history: call for every blocker mentioned
- schedule_followup_meeting: call if a follow-up was agreed. Pass: title, start_datetime (ISO e.g. 2026-06-13T09:00:00), end_datetime (ISO e.g. 2026-06-13T10:00:00), agenda
- send_action_email: call once per unique owner. Pass: recipient_name, recipient_email, task, deadline, priority, meeting_title, follow_up_date, depends_on

After tools, return ONLY raw JSON:
{
  "meeting_summary": "2-3 sentence summary",
  "action_items": [
    { "task": "description", "owner_name": "name", "owner_email": "email", "deadline": "YYYY-MM-DD", "priority": "critical|high|medium|low", "depends_on": "dependency or null" }
  ],
  "decisions": ["decision"],
  "blockers": [{ "description": "blocker", "owner": "owner", "is_recurring": true, "occurrences": 3 }],
  "follow_up_meeting": { "title": "title", "date": "YYYY-MM-DD", "time": "09:00", "duration_minutes": 60, "attendees": ["email"], "agenda": "agenda" },
  "external_participants_detected": true,
  "external_participants": ["Name (Company)"],
  "risk_flags": ["risk"]
}

parameters.name: check_blocker_history
parameters.description: Checks meeting history for recurring blockers. Pass JSON with topic (string).

parameters.name: schedule_followup_meeting
parameters.description: Queues a follow-up meeting for scheduling. Pass: title, start_datetime (ISO), end_datetime (ISO), agenda.

parameters.name: send_action_email
parameters.description: Queues an action item email. Pass: recipient_name, recipient_email, task, deadline, priority, meeting_title, follow_up_date, depends_on.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify(({approve_url: $json.n8n_approve_url, reject_url: $json.n8n_reject_url, meeting_summary: $json.meeting_summary, action_items: $json.action_items, follow_up_meeting: $json.follow_up_meeting, external_participants: $json.external_participants, has_external: $json.has_external, item_count: $json.item_count})) }}

={{ ({message: {subject: $json.subject, body: {contentType: 'HTML', content: $json.html}, toRecipients: [{emailAddress: {address: 'AncyJoseph@Fututrice.onmicrosoft.com'} }], importance: 'high'}, saveToSentItems: true}) }}

={{ ({message: {subject: '[Action Required] ' + $json.task + ' - due ' + $json.deadline, body: {contentType: 'Text', content: 'Hi ' + $json.owner_name + ',

Following the NEURA Robot Arm Integration Sync, you have been assigned:

Task: ' + $json.task + '
Deadline: ' + $json.deadline + '
Priority: ' + ($json.priority || 'medium').toUpperCase() + '
Depends on: ' + ($json.depends_on || 'None') + '

A follow-up review is scheduled for ' + ($('Parse Agent Output').item.json.follow_up_meeting ? $('Parse Agent Output').item.json.follow_up_meeting.date : 'TBD') + '.

Please confirm receipt.

- NEURA AI Meeting Agent
Powered by Futurice

[DEMO] Intended for: ' + $json.owner_email}, toRecipients: [{emailAddress: {address: 'AncyJoseph@Fututrice.onmicrosoft.com'} }], importance: 'high'}, saveToSentItems: true}) }}

={{ ({subject: $('Parse Agent Output').item.json.follow_up_meeting ? $('Parse Agent Output').item.json.follow_up_meeting.title : 'Integration Review Follow-up', startDateTime: ($('Parse Agent Output').item.json.follow_up_meeting ? $('Parse Agent Output').item.json.follow_up_meeting.date : '2026-06-13') + 'T09:00:00.0000000Z', endDateTime: ($('Parse Agent Output').item.json.follow_up_meeting ? $('Parse Agent Output').item.json.follow_up_meeting.date : '2026-06-13') + 'T10:00:00.0000000Z'}) }}

={{ ({subject: $('Parse Agent Output').item.json.follow_up_meeting ? $('Parse Agent Output').item.json.follow_up_meeting.title : 'Integration Review Follow-up', start: {dateTime: ($('Parse Agent Output').item.json.follow_up_meeting ? $('Parse Agent Output').item.json.follow_up_meeting.date : '2026-06-13') + 'T09:00:00', timeZone: 'UTC'}, end: {dateTime: ($('Parse Agent Output').item.json.follow_up_meeting ? $('Parse Agent Output').item.json.follow_up_meeting.date : '2026-06-13') + 'T10:00:00', timeZone: 'UTC'}, body: {contentType: 'HTML', content: 'Agenda: ' + ($('Parse Agent Output').item.json.follow_up_meeting ? $('Parse Agent Output').item.json.follow_up_meeting.agenda : 'Review progress') + '

Join Microsoft Teams Meeting:
Click here to join

Scheduled by NEURA AI Meeting Agent | Powered by Futurice'}, attendees: [{emailAddress: {address: 'AncyJoseph@Fututrice.onmicrosoft.com'}, type: 'required'}]}) }}

assignments.name: actions_taken
assignments.value:
Emails sent to Fututrice inbox
Calendar event created
Teams meeting link generated

assignments.name: message
assignments.value: Human rejected. No emails sent, no calendar event created.
